summary: Hardened OpenCode createSession response validation and directory-level SSE session filtering. createSession now rejects non-2xx responses or missing session ids before opening a terminal, and prompt/watch SSE handling ignores events that do not explicitly belong to the target session.

validation.result: failed as expected: 30 tests, 26 passed, 4 failed. Failures covered createSession non-2xx, createSession missing session id, no-session-id assistant text leakage, and no-session-id idle early termination.
